summary: The SwingRatings algorithm indicates that LKQ is currently testing its Daily 200MA support zone near $30.85. Based on historical price action, bounces from this level have yielded a win rate of 44.4%. The asset has recently tested this support 1 time(s), which may have partially consumed buy-side liquidity. In the event of a successful bounce, traders should monitor overhead supply, particularly a primary horizontal resistance at $31.90 and a significant trendline confluence around $31.87 (formed by 2 points). This setup presents a structured risk-reward profile for swing positioning.
